supabase.description: Supabase MCP — primary database for all narrative content, semantic spans, chapters, and embeddings. Use for migrations, SQL execution, table inspection, and project management.

Google_Drive.description: Google Drive MCP — syncs manuscript .txt files from gdrive_raw/ folder. Use for reading chapter drafts, syncing canonical content, and downloading ingestion-buffer files.

github.description: GitHub MCP — repo mjmichaelware/writing-agent-interface. Use for PR management, CI/CD workflow triggers (semantic-rehash, xml-hash-runner), branch operations, and issue tracking.

Vercel.description: Vercel MCP — production deployment. Use to check deployment status, view build logs, inspect runtime errors, and manage project environment variables.

hooks.command: echo '[hook] Running bash command in writing-agent-interface'

notes.build: Always use: npx next build --webpack (Termux ARM64 / no Turbopack)
notes.branch: Develop on claude/skills-agents-updates-jpdg8x → promote to main after each phase green signal
notes.data_rule: ALL narrative data from Supabase. NEVER fs.readFileSync for manuscript content.
notes.security: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is server-only. Never expose to client. Never include internal docs (compendium/blueprint/mandate/prompt) in reader-facing API responses.
notes.llm_routing: Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) for prose/literary. Gemini 2.0 Flash for multimodal. Groq llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct for fast RAG.
notes.author_pin: AuthorGateway PIN gates cockpit. Value in AUTHOR_PIN env var. Never hardcode.
